nodes.label: TaxeeLotRegistry
nodes.rationale: Immutable on-chain hash commitment per disposal lot. Backs Arc records with onchain fingerprint. Emits LotDisposed event. Deployed at 0x9a16c3d45A3e8Ad23152372405bf1F0dd58496ad on Arc testnet.

nodes.label: TaxeeExecutor
nodes.rationale: Atomic USDC → USYC park / USYC → USDC redeem per tax lot. Prevents partial execution where sell goes through but park doesn't. Deployed at 0x7fD85458A0958C5EB52234f3FF4f0C6bf7cC999c on Arc testnet.

nodes.label: Foundry
nodes.rationale: Solidity development toolchain for smart contracts. Uses forge for build, test, deploy.
